name: io.github.theanshsonkar/emfirge
title: Emfirge
description: Privacy-first AWS security in your AI: attack paths & fix simulation, IDs never sent to the LLM.

environmentVariables.name: EMFIRGE_PRIVACY
environmentVariables.description: Tokenization mode: strict (default), balanced, or off

environmentVariables.name: EMFIRGE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Backend URL — override to point at a self-hosted backend
